programmes.show_description: Numbing Nevus. Monica returns in the hopes that Dr. Lee can remove more of her face growths. Ken has several large cysts on his head that he has tried to remove on his own. S3, Ep16
Driving Miss Lumpy. Corey is a drag queen and has a bump dangling from his backside. And, the large growths on Virginia's upper arms make it difficult to travel in her RV. S3, Ep17
Sarah's Story. After a tough childhood with an abusive stepfather and drug-addicted mother, Sarah weighs over 600 lbs and is fighting for her life at 24 years old. S6, Ep13

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: To Show Or Not To Show. Sacha wants a dress that pushes the envelope and helps her shine. And, new mum Amy wants a gown that will really wow her fiancé. S2, Ep38

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: The Feel Good, Look Good Show. Emily hates to shop, so she's relying on her BFFs - will they choose style or comfort? Hayley's pregnancy means a new gown to accommodate a baby bump! S2, Ep39

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: The Princess At Any Cost Show. Hayley falls in love with a princess gown that threatens the budget. Plus, real-life princess Nana has her final fitting, but will her mother approve? S2, Ep40

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: The Demanding Divas Show. Fussy bride Gina has been to 20 stores and tried on over 50 dresses! She pins all her hopes on David but can he deliver where so many others have failed? S3, Ep1
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Pasadena. Sheldon visits CalTech for the first time. Meanwhile, Georgie is furious when Mary listens in on a phone call with his girlfriend. S3, Ep16
An Academic Crime. Sheldon accuses Dr. Sturgis of plagiarism. Georgie has an awkward run-in with Veronica while on a date with his new girlfriend, Jana. S3, Ep17
A Couple Bruised Ribs. When George Sr. accidentally lands the school librarian in the hospital, the Cooper family look after her. Meemaw gives Georgie relationship advice. S3, Ep18
A House For Sale. When Sheldon learns the house next door is for sale, he looks for the perfect neighbours. Missy pitches against her boyfriend at the baseball game. S3, Ep19
A Baby Tooth. Sheldon has a scientific breakthrough at the dentist. Dale and Meemaw go to the casino. Georgie makes a mistake when he's left in charge of the store. S3, Ep20
A Secret Letter. Sheldon discovers that Mary's been keeping a secret about his future. Also, Meemaw is furious when she learns that Dale fired Georgie. S3, Ep21
Guilt Boots. Georgie panics when he learns that Jim is considering selling the tire store to his rival, and Mandy's forced to confront a long-running lie. S1, Ep21
Big Decisions. Tensions rise when Georgie finds out the truth about Mandy's boss, and Georgie does all he can to buy the tire store before Jim sells it. S1, Ep22
The Septum Deviation. Leonard needs surgery for a deviated septum, and Sheldon feels an operation is too dangerous and that his roommate may not make it out alive. S8, Ep9
The Champagne Reflection. Sheldon bids farewell to his Fun With Flags podcast. Leonard, Howard and Raj probe a late professor's research in search of some hidden significance. S8, Ep10
The Clean Room Infiltration. Amy plans a Victorian dinner for Christmas Eve, while Raj, Leonard and Howard try to remove a pigeon that flew into the clean room at the university. S8, Ep11
The Space Probe Disintegration. Raj awaits data from a space probe in which he was involved. Later, Leonard and Sheldon go dress shopping with Penny and Amy. S8, Ep12
The Anxiety Optimization. Sheldon becomes concerned that his cushy lifestyle is impacting his professional progress, so he asks the gang to make life more difficult for him. S8, Ep13
The Troll Manifestation. An online troll rips Leonard and Sheldon's physics paper, and a girls' night out leads to Penny, Amy and Bernadette dishing about embarrassing events. S8, Ep14
Comic Book Store Regeneration. Howard gets unsettling news amidst the excitement of the comic book store reopening, and Penny doesn't practice what she preaches. S8, Ep15
The Intimacy Acceleration. An experiment designed to make people fall in love piques Penny and Leonard's interest. Meanwhile, Leonard, Amy, Raj and Emily encounter a 'zombie.' S8, Ep16
The Colonization Application. There's trouble in paradise when Amy learns Sheldon signed up for a one-way mission to colonise Mars. Leonard makes an 'adult' purchase for Penny. S8, Ep17
The Leftover Thermalization. An electrical short thaws the last meal cooked by Mrs. Wolowitz, and Sheldon and Leonard's work is featured in a magazine, but only one gets credit. S8, Ep18
The Skywalker Incursion. Leonard and Sheldon consider dropping by George Lucas' Skywalker Ranch when a speaking engagement puts them nearby. S8, Ep19
Fortification Implementation. Sheldon and Amy reach a crossroad, a man claiming to be Wolowitz's half-brother shows up, and Penny and Leonard argue live on Wil Wheaton's podcast. S8, Ep20
Communication Deterioration. NASA asks Raj to craft a message for aliens in the event of contact, and Penny must choose between an audition or her job in pharmaceutical sales. S8, Ep21
The Graduation Transmission. Wolowitz and Sheldon can't get a drone to fly, Leonard nearly misses giving a commencement address, and Raj pits his parents against each other. S8, Ep22
The Maternal Combustion. Leonard and Sheldon's mothers come to town to celebrate their sons getting an award, but the opinionated women engage in an altercation over religion. S8, Ep23
The Commitment Determination. Leonard and Penny are pressured to set a wedding date by Sheldon, whose relationship with Amy has taken an interesting turn. S8, Ep24
The Matrimonial Momentum. Penny has a problem dealing with Leonard's confession about having kissed another woman, while Sheldon is confused about Amy calling a time out. S9, Ep1
The Separation Oscillation. To ease Penny's mind, Leonard pays a visit to the woman he kissed during his expedition to the North Sea. Sheldon's breakup leads him to retaliate. S9, Ep2
The Bachelor Party Corrosion. The guys surprise Leonard with a belated bachelor-party weekend in Mexico, but their plans hit a bump in the road when they get a flat tire. S9, Ep3
The 2003 Approximation. Sheldon reverts to 2003 when he learns that Leonard and Penny are moving in together, while Howard and Raj form a band to play at the comic store. S9, Ep4
Dara Ó Briain introduces an end of series special featuring a look back at the best bits, hilarious out-takes and some brand-new material. S1, Ep9
Emma and Adam set up a seemingly perfect arrangement: no strings attached. But when a fling becomes a thing, can sex friends stay best friends?
Graduation. After graduating high school, Sheldon has a breakdown when he realises he may not be ready for college. Also, Dale tries to make amends with Meemaw. S4, Ep1
A Docent, A Little Lady. While Sheldon volunteers at a local train museum, Missy embarks on a new stage of womanhood, and Georgie discovers his mother's guilty pleasure. S4, Ep2
Alligator Skin. Terry's nose growth has prevented him from meeting his grandkids. And, Remi has alligator-like skin and is not used to taking care of herself. S3, Ep18
Robert's Story. At nearly 900lbs Robert is bed-ridden and living in a nursing home. Can he make the radical life changes needed to save his life? S6, Ep14

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: The Mom Knows Best. Becka dreams of a princess gown, but her mum prefers a more fitted look. Stacey and her future mother-in-law love a Cinderella style but can't agree on the dress! S3, Ep2

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: The Opinionated Entourage Show. An entourage can be more of a hindrance than a help! Catherine's had trouble wedding dress shopping due to the opinions of her mum and her best man. S3, Ep3

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: The To Show Or Cover Show. Eccentric bride Hazelle wants a gown that shows her tattoos. But her strict step-mum wants them covered. And, will Khiea and her mum ever agree on a style? S3, Ep4

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: The Bride's Best Man Show. Tensions rise when Bethany and her brother, who is paying for her gown, can't decide on style. Plus, David wants bride Sian to dress head-to-tie in bling. S3, Ep5
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Training Wheels. Sheldon is determined to ride his bike without training wheels and has Missy teach him. Mary and George argue over parenting styles. S4, Ep3
Bible Camp And A Chariot Of Love. Sheldon ends up in a fierce competition with Paige after their mums force them to attend Vacation Bible School. Georgie makes a questionable purchase. S4, Ep4
A Musty Crypt. While Mary and George take a trip, Georgie freaks out when his girlfriend thinks she's pregnant. Dale and Meemaw work out their relationship issues. S4, Ep5
Freshman Orientation. While college orientation does not go as Sheldon planned, Mary is mistaken for a university student and invited to a party. S4, Ep6
A Philosophy Class. Sheldon's first day of college is derailed by his new philosophy teacher. Mary and Brenda live vicariously through Missy's first day of middle school. S4, Ep7
An Existential Crisis. Meemaw takes matters into her own hands when Sheldon's philosophy teacher, Professor Ericson, sends him into a tailspin. S4, Ep8
The Perspiration Implementation. When Barry Kripke gives the guys fencing lessons, he makes a point of letting Sheldon know he's interested in dating Amy. S9, Ep5
The Helium Insufficiency. A helium shortage leads Sheldon and Leonard to do business with a dealer in the black market to acquire some of the element for an experiment. S9, Ep6
The Spock Resonance. Sheldon's interview for a 'Star Trek' documentary focusing on Spock turns up a shocking revelation about his breakup with Amy. S9, Ep7
The Mystery Date Observation. When Leonard, Penny and Bernadette learn that Amy is going out on a dinner date, the trio set out to spy on her and the guy. S9, Ep8
The Platonic Permutation. Sheldon and Amy spend Thanksgiving at the aquarium, Wolowitz volunteers at a soup kitchen, and Penny realises that Leonard knows a lot about her. S9, Ep9
The Earworm Reverberation. God only knows what song is constantly playing in Sheldon's head, but it reminds him of Amy and leads to a surprising revelation. S9, Ep10
The Opening Night Excitation. Professor Proton visits Sheldon in a dream and gives him Obi-Wan-like advice about whether to go see the new Star Wars film or spend time with Amy. S9, Ep11
The Sales Call Sublimation. Penny entices Leonard to meet with a psychiatrist, Stuart moves out of the Wolowitz house, and Howard and Bernadette find themselves at a loss. S9, Ep12
The Empathy Optimization. Dealing with an under-the-weather Sheldon is draining for Penny, Leonard and the gang so they decide to treat themselves to a Sheldon-less weekend. S9, Ep13
The Meemaw Materialization. Sheldon's Meemaw visits and there's friction between her and Amy, which intensifies after the elderly woman blurts out a secret about Sheldon. S9, Ep14
The Valentino Submergence. Sheldon and Amy celebrate Valentine's Day, Leonard and Penny feel the pangs of aging, and Howard and Bernadette find a surprise in their hot tub. S9, Ep15
The Positive Negative Reaction. The gang learns Bernadette is pregnant and celebrates with karaoke. Meanwhile, Howard freaks out, convinced he must make more money for the baby. S9, Ep16
The Celebration Experimentation. Sheldon and the gang celebrate his birthday and he's surprised by a special guest. S9, Ep17
The Application Deterioration. Howard reconsiders entering into a legal partnership with Leonard and Sheldon, and the women offer Raj dating advice. S9, Ep18
The Solder Excursion Diversion. Sheldon shocks Amy with a startling revelation after she buys him a laptop. Raj throws Leonard and Howard under the bus when they lie to their wives. S9, Ep19
The Big Bear Precipitation. Sheldon shares a secret about Leonard when the two go on a weekend trip with Penny and Amy; Raj goes all out with pregnancy gifts. S9, Ep20
The Viewing Party Combustion. During a group get-together, a minor argument between Sheldon and Leonard turns into a heated debate, leaving the rest of the gang to choose sides. S9, Ep21
The Fermentation Bifurcation. Sheldon stays with Bernadette while the rest of the gang attends an event where they run into Penny's former boyfriend and meet Raj's girlfriend. S9, Ep22
The Line Substitution Solution. Sheldon hires Stuart to spend the day with Amy. Meanwhile Leonard's mother visits, and Penny just can't seem to connect with her. S9, Ep23
The Convergence Convergence. Leonard's recently divorced parents roll into town, as does Sheldon's holy-roller mother, and all hell breaks loose. S9, Ep24
The Conjugal Conjecture. The gang deals with the awkward aftermath of an overnight liaison between Sheldon's mum and Leonard's dad. Penny's dysfunctional family is in town. S10, Ep1
The Military Miniaturization. An Air Force bigwig approaches the guys about their revolutionary invention, and Bernadette is upset with Penny after she accidentally leaks a secret. S10, Ep2
The Dependence Transcendence. Howard and Leonard are putting in late nights at work, Raj and a pregnant Bernadette spend a day together, and Penny and Amy take in a faculty party. S10, Ep3
Cohabitation Experimentation. Sheldon and Amy decide to move in together. Meanwhile, Howard and Bernadette become upset when Raj learns the gender of their baby before they do. S10, Ep4
Dara Ó Briain introduces an end of series special featuring a look back at the best bits, hilarious out-takes and some brand-new material. S1, Ep9
The Curious Case Of The Pooting Cyst. Diane has thousands of tumours all over her body that have ruined her life. Plus, Will is worried his shoulder lump will be ripped open at work. S1, Ep6
